mapping.a_element: Parisi's solution of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model
mapping.b_element: overlap distribution and replica symmetry breaking in the p-spin spherical model
thermodynamics of the p-spin spherical model (pure states, static transition)

mapping.a_element: supersymmetric quantum mechanics and D-brane landscapes

brief_justification: Both papers share the core machinery of mean-field spin-glass theory, including the replica formalism, overlap order parameters, and replica symmetry breaking. The abstracts explicitly reference these methods, with Paper A focusing on the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model and Paper B on the p-spin spherical model, both of which are canonical examples of spin-glass systems.
